title: wedelia acapulcensis
intro: Wedelia acapulcensis, also known as Sumpa or Mexican Tarragon, is a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia acapulcensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Wedelia acapulcensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
